arts.ttl: Growing belief Manchester United ‘could be the ones’ to pay €75m clause – Club ready to deal and invest money
arts.sum: Manchester United ‘could be the ones’ to pay Victor Osimhen’s €75m release clause in the January transfer window, with Napoli ready to do business. That’s according to Il Mattino, via Napoli Magazine, who say Manchester United are very much in the mix for the Nigerian striker. arts.sum: Berchimas to trial at Man Utd The forward regularly features for the club's MLS Next Pro side Crown Legacy FC as well as the United States U20 national team.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo says Nottingham Forest have an 'important' player who's barely been seen
Lisandro Martinez reveals what he has in common with Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is making a quick impact at Manchester United with defender Lisandro Martinez hailing the head coach's energy since arriving at Old Trafford last month

arts.ttl: Chido Obi-Martin comment speaks volumes after starlet swaps Arsenal for Man Utd
arts.sum: Former Arsenal starlet Chido Obi-Martin has been lighting up the Premier League at under-18 level and his stunning self-belief could mean Manchester United have a major prospect on their hands

arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye possible Man Utd transfer - and Ruben Amorim won’t be happy
arts.sum: Real Madrid eye possible Man Utd transfer – and Amorim won’t be happy Real Madrid are ready to launch a transfer bid for Manchester United centre-back Lisandro Martinez, according to a report.

arts.ttl: ‘Marinaki$’ – Fans graffiti stadium to demand club is sold to Nottingham Forest owner
arts.sum: Fans of Brazilian club Vasco appear determined to get Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis as their new owner, demanding that the club be sold to him. That’s according to O Dia, who report that Vasco fans have graffitied their stadium in support of the Nottingham Forest owner’s takeover bid.
